author: Graeme Maxwell
text: Danny was very helpful and came to look at the job and offered a competitive quote. Job was done within a week of the quotation and I'm very happy with the work done. I'll definitely use Quality Electrics again for any jobs that arise.
ownerReply: So glad Danny could provide not only a great quote but also quick, quality service for you! Thanks for being part of the Quality Electrics family.

author: Gaelle Pertot
text: The issue was dealt quickly, good service.
ownerReply: Thanks Gaelle, glad you were pleased with the service!

author: Paula Rydzynska
text: Danny was able to help with some ceiling light issues. Speedy service and reasonably priced.
ownerReply: Thanks Paula, glad you were happy with the service!

author: Jason Armstrong
text: Professional from the start. Came out to see the tasks I needed completing around the house, provided an estimate, competent friendly electricians came out 2 days later and supplied and fitted everything.
ownerReply: Thanks for taking the time to leave a review. Glad you were happy with the service!

author: Craig
text: Great and professional.

author: Alan Kirkwood
text: First time I have used Danny for an urgent repair and replacement of kitchen lighting and found him an excellent electrician — went above and beyond to resolve the problem, couldn't have been more helpful.

author: Phil Sisson
text: Recommended — great work, pride in the job, really easy to deal with and a fair price. Top marks all round.

author: Helen MacLean
text: Fantastic service. Danny was great in organising a professional and timely service. Good communication throughout too. Calum, who fitted a new consumer unit, was a tidy worker and very pleasant and super helpful, replacing an old light fitting for me too. Very pleased with the service. Highly recommend and would use again.
ownerReply: Thanks Helen, glad you were happy with the service!

author: Lisa Kirkpatrick
text: Calum made such a good job fixing a switch in our flat. He came on time and it was quick and easy getting it fixed. I highly recommend!
ownerReply: Thanks Lisa, glad you were pleased!

author: Sarah Innes
text: Really good quality work and very reliable! Danny came out and gave a quote at really short notice. Rachel came to do the job and was 10/10, couldn't fault her! Will defo use this company again! Thank you so much.
ownerReply: Thanks Sarah, glad you were happy with the team!

author: Ben Kay
text: Danny and his team were superb with the full rewire of our house. Great price, communicative, quick and happy to address a few extras we thought of along the way. Definitely use them in the future.

author: Collette Mccarthy
text: Danny installed an EV charger at my house and changed my consumer unit. He did a great job, his communication was really good and he was kind and courteous. Would recommend.

author: David McGill
text: Professional, tidy and efficient — I would highly recommend Danny and his team at Quality Electrics. I had concerns with flickering and dimming ceiling lights both upstairs and down in my home. After Danny's initial survey he identified a partial rewire of my property was required. He then explained the way forward and provided options along with a quote. Thereafter, the entire process was seamless and professional. I would not hesitate to call Danny again at Quality Electrics.
ownerReply: Thanks for the feedback David, patiently awaiting your next call!

author: Zeqi Luo
text: Daniel did a fantastic job installing these lovely spotlights! He is so friendly, has lots of experience and is very patient. He always makes sure to clean up once the work is done. I would highly recommend him and Quality Electrics, and I will definitely use them again for any future projects.

author: Archie Toppin
text: Dan and Rachel are honest, reliable, polite and efficient electricians. Rachel installed a new distribution box and Dan installed a new thermostat at short notice when our central heating suddenly stopped working. Dan offers a personal service at value for money prices. I'm happy to recommend Quality Electrics.

author: Adrien Miet
text: Danny came as scheduled and on time today. He was really professional, he took time to explain the issue and how to fix it. Got the issue fixed and at a reasonable price. I have now recommended him to my family and I will be sure to use his service again.
ownerReply: Thanks Adrien, glad you were happy with the service!

author: Paul
text: Prompt reply and timely visit, took the time to thoroughly investigate and resolve the electrical problem we had. I am happy to recommend and would use QE again.

author: Isobel Bowie
text: Great communication, arrived on time, and was able to tidy up the wiring in my tenement flat. I also got really great advice on updates required to meet current health and safety requirements.

author: Don Robertson
text: Really efficient and tidy job installing an EV home charger. Very happy, definitely recommend.

author: Hannah Gunn
text: Professional. Goes the extra mile. Highly reliable and trustworthy management.

author: Andy
text: Delighted with the job Danny completed for me when installing a commando socket to charge my EV. He is polite, informative, reliable and extremely competent. Highly recommended and very well priced.

author: Leslie W
text: Dan was friendly, professional, and knew his stuff. He replaced our consumer unit quickly, and provided the EIC certificate without any hassle. Would highly recommend him to anyone needing reliable electrical work done!
ownerReply: Thanks Leslie, pleased you were happy with the service.

author: Harry Thomson
text: Came quickly and did a good job of installing 2 new plugs.

author: David Tait
text: We received a superb service from Danny of Quality Electrics. We had a number of internal and external tasks, including: the fitting of a Ring Door Bell and 2 security cameras; moving of internal light fittings; wall mounting of a TV; trouble shooting some faulty exterior lights; and fitting of a series of garden lights. Having dealt with a number of electricians over the years, I found Danny's work to be of a very high quality. He was wholly reliable, transparent when he encountered challenges, and polite. I can't recommend Quality Electrics enough and I certainly will be using their services in the future.
ownerReply: Thanks David, glad you were pleased with the work!

author: Iain Ross
text: Fantastic service and great communication. Turned up on time and did a great job. Also was very flexible with times, which helped us a lot as the job was on a shop that was open at the time. Can't recommend enough. Will be referring to all my friends.

author: Rachel Sibbald
text: Absolutely fantastic service. Danny was able to have one of his engineers out to me within 48 hours, and they did a superb job of replacing my fuseboard. Very good, friendly and excellent communication. Highly recommend.
ownerReply: Thanks Rachel, glad to hear it!

author: Craig Love
text: EV charger repair — really good job and very reasonably priced! I would highly recommend.
